headline: Singleton Pattern
description: Ensures a class has only one instance and provides global access. Used for shared resources: database connections, config, logging. Modern criticism: hidden global state, testing difficulty.

citation.name: Design Patterns: Elements of Reusable OO Software (30th Anniversary Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Gamma E., Helm R., Johnson R., Vlissides J.

citation.name: Singleton and Creational Patterns: Modern Alternatives (2025)
citation.author: multiple
